what-is-ssh.title: What Is SSH? The Complete Guide to Secure Shell
what-is-ssh.description: SSH (Secure Shell) is a cryptographic protocol for secure remote access and file transfer. Learn what SSH is, how it works, and why every developer needs it.

what-is-an-ssh-key.title: What Is an SSH Key? Public and Private Keys Explained
what-is-an-ssh-key.description: An SSH key is a public/private key pair for secure login. Learn what SSH keys are, how authentication works, where keys are stored, and how to use them with GitHub.

ssh-command.title: SSH Command Examples: Syntax, Flags, Tunnels, and Keys
ssh-command.description: Learn the ssh command syntax with practical examples for Linux, macOS, and Windows. Covers ssh -i, ports, tunnels, ProxyJump, config aliases, and debugging.

how-to-set-up-ssh.title: How to Set Up SSH Keys for GitHub, Linux, Mac, and Windows
how-to-set-up-ssh.description: Set up SSH keys step by step: generate a key pair, install the public key, configure ssh-agent, add keys to GitHub or GitLab, and fix common errors.
keywords: how to set up ssh key github

generate-ssh-key.title: Generate SSH Key: Online Tool and ssh-keygen Commands
generate-ssh-key.description: Generate an SSH key online or with ssh-keygen. Covers Ed25519, RSA 4096, GitHub, GitLab, Linux servers, and deployment keys.

ssh-keygen.title: ssh-keygen Command: Create SSH Keys with Examples
ssh-keygen.description: Practical ssh-keygen examples for creating Ed25519 and RSA SSH keys, choosing a file name, adding a passphrase, checking fingerprints, and testing GitHub or server access.

what-is-ssh.title: SSH 是什么？Secure Shell 安全外壳协议完整指南
what-is-ssh.description: SSH（安全外壳协议）是用于安全远程访问和文件传输的加密协议。了解 SSH 是什么、它如何工作，以及为什么每位开发者都需要它。

what-is-an-ssh-key.title: SSH 密钥是什么？公钥、私钥与密钥对完整说明
what-is-an-ssh-key.description: SSH 密钥是用于安全身份验证的加密凭证。了解 SSH 密钥是什么、公钥和私钥如何工作，以及如何在 GitHub 中使用它们。

ssh-command.title: SSH 命令完整参考：Linux、Mac 和 Windows 示例
ssh-command.description: Linux、macOS 和 Windows 下 SSH 命令的完整指南，包含示例。涵盖 ssh -i 标志、隧道、ProxyJump、关键选项和 PowerShell SSH。

how-to-set-up-ssh.title: 如何设置 SSH：Linux、Mac 和 Windows 完整分步指南
how-to-set-up-ssh.description: 了解如何在 Linux、macOS 和 Windows 上设置 SSH。分步指南涵盖密钥生成、ssh-copy-id、ssh-agent、GitHub SSH 设置和故障排查。

generate-ssh-key.title: 生成 SSH 密钥：在线工具与 ssh-keygen 命令
generate-ssh-key.description: 在线生成 SSH 密钥，或用 ssh-keygen 创建 Ed25519/RSA 密钥对。适用于 GitHub、GitLab、Linux 服务器登录和部署密钥。

ssh-keygen.title: ssh-keygen 命令：生成 SSH 密钥的实用示例
ssh-keygen.description: ssh-keygen 生成 Ed25519/RSA SSH 密钥的实用示例，包含文件名、注释、密码短语、指纹、GitHub 和服务器连接测试。
